name: TCIL_SetTCStatus
title: TCIL_SetTCStatus
syntax: long TCIL_SetTCStatus(dword cycleTime, pg PD); // form 2
long TCIL_SetTCStatus(dbNode tc, dword cycleTime); // form 3
long TCIL_SetTCStatus(dbNode tc, dword cycleTime, pg pgPD); // form 4
description: This function changes the content and cycle time of the TC Status message.
Form 1 and 3: The content of TC Status message stays unchanged; only the cycle time is changed.

parameters.name: tc
parameters.description: TC simulation node to apply the function

parameters.name: cycleTime
parameters.description: Cycle time of the TC Status message [ms] (default: 1000)

parameters.name: pgPD
parameters.description: Content of this message is used by the following TC Status messages sent by the TC IL

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
